close_reason: Style: String::from vs .to_string() in map — equivalent
description:
lib.rs:155 and lib.rs:170:
```rust
.param("addr").map(|s| s.to_string())
.param("field").map(|s| s.to_string())
```

Slightly more idiomatic:
```rust
.param("addr").map(String::from)
.param("field").map(String::from)
```

Function-pointer form is shorter and avoids the closure allocation in debug builds. clippy::redundant_closure lints this.

P4 because both forms compile to identical code in release; this is a taste call. Marking as opinion.
title: Use String::from instead of |s| s.to_string() in .map() calls
